papers.title: EIT-Pneumatic Hybrid Robotic Skin for Practical and Accurate Force Map Reconstruction
HumanoidMimicGen: Data Generation for Loco-Manipulation via Whole-Body Planning
papers.summary: HumanoidMimicGen通过将接触丰富的全身技能从少量源演示泛化到新状态，自动生成稳定的无碰撞legged loco-manipulation数据。

papers.title: Uni-LaViRA: Language-Vision-Robot Actions Translation for Unified Embodied Navigation
Towards Shared Embodied Intelligence in Humanoid Robots through Optimization Development and Testing of the Human Aware ergoCub Robot
papers.summary: 该论文提出一种将共享智能与具身认知整合的架构，通过基于人体工效学指标优化人形机器人硬件与控制，并研制了ergoCub机器人样机来实现与人类的物理协作。

papers.title: ParkourFormer: Integrating Predictive Supervision and Sequence Modeling into Parkour Locomotion
papers.summary: ParkourFormer将人形机器人parkour运动重新定义为未来条件决策问题，通过Transformer序列建模显式预测短期未来本体感受状态，结合历史轨迹交叉注意和监督预测头，使策略能够主动预判接触转换和身体动态，从而实现更鲁棒的全地形通用运动控制。

companyNews.title: The Real Reason Google Sold Boston Dynamics to SoftBank - Geeky Gadgets
companyNews.summary: Google将Boston Dynamics出售给软银，反映当时科技巨头对商业化机器人投资回报的谨慎态度，标志人形机器人行业从实验室向商业化转型面临的现实挑战。

companyNews.title: The race of humanoid robots in factories has truly begun, Hyundai announced that it will deploy more than 25,000 units of Atlas in its production lines starting in 2028, in a partnership that involves Boston Dynamics and training with Google DeepMind. - CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
companyNews.summary: Hyundai计划2028年前在生产线部署超25000台Atlas机器人，与Boston Dynamics

companyNews.title: Hyundai's Atlas Robot Performs Rabona Kick in Soccer Showcase - Seoul Economic Daily
companyNews.summary: Hyundai旗下Atlas机器人完成高难度Rabona足球踢球动作，展现双足机器人精细运动控制和平衡能力新突破，标志着人形机器人在动态运动领域取得显著进展。
